source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
distilled_thesis: The homeland is the settled place Zarathustra leaves at the route's opening, making departure concrete rather than merely inward.
